title: Harden closeout evidence guard
goal: Make verified and done transitions require typed evidence, source authority, hash binding and queue cleanup.

acceptance.assertion: A task cannot become verified without receipt id, evidence hash, command/source reference and task or PR binding where applicable.
Terminal tasks are absent from active queue lanes after closeout.
AI or prose summaries alone are rejected as closeout evidence.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T004 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is the closeout evidence guard.

verified_acceptance.verified-evidence-required: PR #302 upgrades automatic PR completion receipts to typed v2 receipts with receipt_id, receipt_sha256, source, source_ref and evidence_sha256; apply_ready skips mutation unless those fields are present.
verified_acceptance.done-queue-cleanup: PR #302 hardens Registry validation so verified/cancelled/superseded tasks cannot remain in any queue lane; tests cover terminal queue rejection.
verified_acceptance.ai-summary-insufficient: PR #302 blocks AI/prose-only evidence objects in task_finish scan; tests cover ai_summary evidence being rejected.

validation: PR #302 CI validate succeeded for Python 3.10 and 3.12 before merge.
Local validation before PR creation: PYTHONPATH=src make validate -> 407 passed.
